queue.title: Backup substitution rate dashboard in A audit
queue.description: Add substitution frequency tracking to audit-stats.mjs. Read backup_substitutions from engagement-trace.json across recent E sessions. Report 'N substitutions in last 10 E sessions, top replaced: X'. Surface chronically unreachable platforms that should be circuit-broken rather than substituted.

queue.title: TODO scan: tighten exclusions based on FP rate data
queue.description: The todo_false_positive_rate metric shows 51% combined FP rate (elevated). Queue-level FP rate is 78% (18/23 todo-scan items retired). Use per-item text from todo-tracker.json to identify new exclusion patterns or widen existing ones in todo-false-positives.json. Alternatively raise ingest threshold in queue-pipeline.mjs to require more specific TODO comments.

queue.title: Add tw_run_fn helper to timeout-wrapper.sh
queue.description: Currently tw_run requires 'bash -c ...' for multi-line check logic. Adding a tw_run_fn helper that wraps function dispatch (declare -f + call) would simplify future hook migrations to timeout-wrapper.sh. Small utility addition, clear scope.

queue.title: Integrate audit-cost-escalation.mjs into A session pre-hook
queue.description: audit-cost-escalation.mjs currently needs manual invocation by A sessions. Add it as an A-type-only pre-session hook that runs before audit starts, so cost trend wq items exist when A session reads the queue. Thin hook wrapper: call `node audit-cost-escalation.mjs`, log output.

queue.title: Pre-compute human-review validation in audit-stats.mjs
queue.description: Currently validate-human-review.mjs --json is called on-demand during A session Section 5. Integrate it into audit-stats.mjs pre-computed output so A sessions see HR validation status alongside other stats at session start, reducing ad-hoc visual inspection overriding the validator.

queue.title: Monitor E session cost trend — last-5 avg $1.74
queue.description: Auto-escalation: E session cost trend breached $1.5 threshold. Last-5 avg $1.74 vs last-10 avg $1.7 (→ threshold_breach). Review session efficiency and enforce cost controls.

outcome.note: Tightened E session cost controls: soft cap $2.50→$1.80, target $2.30→$1.50, exit gate 8m→6m. Added debug file prohibition and platform failure fast-skip protocol. Root cause: duration (>8m = >$2) and scope bleed (debug file creation). Efficient sessions (<5m) cost <$1.00.
